{{Quote|Walk with care! Only our bravest survive these lands. You soft feet are a barely tolerated insult.|translated=1|Gorwooken to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] on the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Gorwooken''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who operated the [[Liftcar/Legends|elevator]] that allowed for easy transport between the tree cities and the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was from the village of [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]]. He was one of the many lives who crossed paths with that of [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] following the memory wipe of the fomer [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]. He was killed when he attempted to stop Revan for letting the Wookiee [[Freyyr]] live.

==Behind the scenes==
In Knights of the Old Republic, if the player decides to have Revan kill Freyyr, Gorwooken will not attack them and instead give them a personal escort to Chuundar himself due to have heard from his spies that Freyyr has been killed.
